source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A small object with mass \( m \), charge \( q \), and initial speed \( v_0 = 5.00 \times 10^3\text{m/s} \) is projected into a uniform electric field of magnitude \( E = 800\text{N/C} \). Ignore gravity and air resistance. Calculate the object's charge-to-mass ratio, \( q/m \)

An image asset exists and registry_passed=true, so there is likely non-text information needed for solving
multi_step: The solver likely must extract one or more missing physical quantities or geometric relations from the image, then apply an electric-motion formula
This is more than direct lookup because it involves combining given text values with image-derived information
Conservative score because the actual image content is not provided in the input fields
verifiability: answer_type=short_text with a specific numeric result makes final-answer checking straightforward
Multiple-choice options are provided, which supports answer validation
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true indicate the sample is structurally complete
